_meta.keyKnowledge: We learn ways that understanding between culturally diverse groups can be encouraged and achieved.

_source.w: We learn ways that understanding between culturally diverse groups can be encouraged and achieved.
y: Building intercultural understanding requires deliberate effort, not just good intentions.
Learning practical strategies for bridging cultural divides prepares us to be peacemakers.
Intercultural understanding benefits everyone — it makes communities stronger and more resilient.
eg: We explore how schools promote intercultural understanding through events, programs and education.
We discuss strategies for building friendship across cultural differences.
We investigate community initiatives that bring diverse groups together.
We practise active listening skills that help us understand perspectives different from our own.
We explore how shared projects and activities can build understanding between groups.
We discuss what gets in the way of intercultural understanding and how to overcome barriers.
